kirundi.vision_audit_failed_the_file_may_be_to: Igenzura ry'ukubona ryanze. Idosiye ishobora kuba nini cane canke idashigikiwe.
kirundi.audit_failed_try_different_content_or_: Igenzura ryanze. Gerageza ibindi bikubiyemo canke URL yoroshe.
kirundi.digital_accessibility_lab: ♿ Laboratwari y'Uburyo bwo Kugera ku Bikoresho vya Digitale
kirundi.ai_runs_a_wcag_2_1_aa_pass_against_url: AI ikora igenzura rya WCAG 2.1 AA ku iyinjizwa rya URL / HTML / PDF / ifoto ya ecran / imbuga nkoranyambaga / leta. Ivyabonetse bisanzwe: umwandiko usimbura ubuze (1.1.1), itandukaniro ry'amabara munsi ya 4.5:1 (1.4.3), imitego ya keyboard (2.1.1), imyanya idafite akamenyetso (3.3.2).
kirundi.perceivable_operable_understandable_ro: Bishobora kumvikana, Bishobora gukoreshwa, Bitomoye, Bikomeye (POUR). Buri gipimo ca WCAG kijana na kimwe muri ibi. Ubumuga ni ukutahuza hagati y'umubiri n'ibidukikije, ntibikunze kuba imiterere y'umuntu.
kirundi.knowbility_austin_tx_est_1999_runs_ope: Knowbility (Austin, TX, yashinzwe 1999) iyobora OpenAIR — hackathon y'ukugera imaze igihe kirekire ku isi — kandi itoza abahanga binyuze muri AccessU. Banditse igice kinini c'igitabo c'amabwiriza buri mugenzuzi w'iki gihe akoresha.
kirundi.you_don_t_need_a_lawyer_to_file_an_ada: Ntukeneye umunyamategeko kugira ngo utange ikirego ca ADA Title II / III. Ishami ry'Ubutabera (ada.gov), Section 508 (section508.gov), n'ibiro vy'abashinjacaha bakuru ba leta vyose vyakira ibirego vy'abaturage — kandi urubuga rwa leta rutaboneka ni urinyuranyije n'amategeko.
kirundi.past_audits_saved_here_so_you_can_trac: Amagenzura ashize abikwa hano kugira ngo ubashe gukurikirana ni izihe mbuga zateye imbere (canke zangiritse) mu gihe. Imibare ihujwe ikwemerera kugaragaza ikibazo gishobora gusangirwa na IT y'ishure canke umucuruzi.
kirundi.paste_any_html_code_from_a_school_proj: Omeka kode iyo ari yo yose ya HTML — iva mu mushinga w'ishure, urupapuro rwa interineti, canke yakozwe n'igikoresho co gukora kode. AI izayigenzura ku bibazo vyo kugera.
kirundi.the_ai_will_check_for_tagged_structure: AI izagenzura: imiterere ifite ibimenyetso, urutonde rwo gusoma, umwandiko usimbura ku mashusho, ibimenyetso vy'amafishi, itandukaniro ry'amabara, itangazo ry'ururimi, n'urutonde rw'imitwe.
kirundi.upload_a_screenshot_of_a_website_app_o: Ohereza ifoto ya ecran y'urubuga, porogaramu, canke inyandiko
kirundi.the_ai_will_visually_analyze_the_scree: AI izasesengura ifoto ya ecran mu maso: ibibazo vy'itandukaniro ry'amabara, ibimenyetso bibuze, ibibazo vy'igishushanyo, ukubasha gusoma umwandiko, n'inzitizi zo kugera mu maso.
kirundi.paste_the_post_text_include_hashtags_m: Omeka umwandiko w'inyandiko (shiramwo hashtags, kuvuga, n'ibisobanuro vy'amashusho)
kirundi.paste_the_full_post_text_here_include_:
Omeka umwandiko wuzuye w'inyandiko hano...

Shiramwo:
• Ibikubiyemo vyose vy'umwandiko
• Hashtags
• Ibisobanuro vy'amashusho (nimba bihari)
• URL z'amahuza
kirundi.rewrite_post_accessibly: Subiramwo inyandiko mu buryo bworoshe kugera
kirundi.government_school_title_ii_audit: Igenzura rya Title II rya leta / ishure
kirundi.audit_government_and_school_websites_f: Genzura imbuga za leta n'amashure ku bijanye no kubahiriza ADA Title II. Birimwo igenzura risanzwe rya WCAG n'ibisabwa vyihariye vya Title II.
kirundi.checks_wcag_2_1_aa_ada_coordinator_inf: Igenzura WCAG 2.1 AA + amakuru ya Coordinateur wa ADA, itangazo ry'ukugera, uburyo bwo gutanga ikirego, gushira ibimenyetso kuri PDF, ukugera ku mafishi, amagambo yanditse, n'ibikoresho vy'abandi.
kirundi.this_score_is_generated_by_an_ai_model: Iri nota rikozwe na model ya AI yiyumvira ku vyo ishobora kubona — si ikizamini ca WCAG cikora. Emeza imibare nyayo y'itandukaniro, urutonde rwa keyboard, n'aho vyibandwaho ukoresheje ibikoresho nka axe, WAVE, canke Lighthouse.
kirundi.title_ii_things_to_investigate: ⚖️ Title II — ibintu vyo gukora iperereza
kirundi.alloflow_cannot_fetch_or_inspect_a_liv: AlloFlow ntishobora kuzana canke kugenzura urubuga rukora — ibi ni amakekero ya AI aturuka ku makuru y'imyitozo, si ivyavumbuwe vyemejwe. Ntukavuge ko bibahiriza canke ngo utange ikirego ushingiye kuri vyo utabanje kugenzura buri kimwe wenyine.
kirundi.core_criteria_click_any_to_learn_more: ibipimo vy'ibanze. Fyonda ico ari co cose kugira ngo wige vyinshi.
kirundi.a_real_wcag_ratio_computed_in_your_bro: Igipimo nyaco ca WCAG kibaruwa muri murondera yawe kiva ku rumuri rugereranya — si iciyumviro ca AI. Toranya ibara ry'umwandiko n'ibara ry'inyuma.
kirundi.large_18pt_or_14pt_bold_this_is_the_ex: Munini = 18pt+ (canke 14pt+ vyibobora). Iyi ni yo mibare nyayo axe / WAVE / Lighthouse zikoresha.
kirundi.press_tab_to_move_between_these_two_bu: Fyonda Tab kugira ngo unyure hagati y'aya mabuto abiri. Rimwe rerekana aho keyboard yibanze; irindi rirahisha — ukoresha keyboard gusa yazimira.
kirundi.creating_an_inclusive_digital_world_si: Gukora isi ya digitale irimwo bose kuva 1999
kirundi.annual_hands_on_training_conference_hy: Impanuro y'amahugurwa ya buri mwaka y'ubushobozi (hybrid). Yiswe Dr. John Slatin, yigisha ubuhanga bufatika mu gukora kode, ukoreshwa, n'igishushanyo kirimwo bose. Igice gikurikira: Rusama 11–14, 2026.
kirundi.an_8_week_global_online_competition_pa: Irushanwa mpuzamahanga rikorerwa kuri interineti rimara ivyumweru 8 rihuza inzobere za web z'abakorerabushake n'imiryango itari iy'inyungu kugira ngo bubake imbuga ziboneka. Ryatangiye nka hackathon y'umunsi umwe ryiyongera riba gahunda y'ibanze ya Knowbility.
kirundi.help_with_registration_room_hosting_an: Fasha mu kwiyandikisha, kwakira amasaro, no gushigikira. Bona uburenganzira bwo kwitabira impanuro ku buntu ku gice c'amasaha 4-8.
kirundi.attend_accessu_sessions_use_free_resou: Witabire ibice vya AccessU, koresha ibikoresho vy'ubuntu, kandi wubake ubuhanga bwawe bwo kugera.
kirundi.found_accessibility_barriers_generate_: Wabonye inzitizi zo kugera? Kora urwandiko rw'ikirego rwemewe usaba impinduka. Toranya uwo wohereza:
kirundi.e_g_portland_public_schools_city_of_au: urugero Portland Public Schools, Umuji wa Austin
kirundi.describe_the_impact_who_is_affected_an: Sigura ingaruka (ni nde bigira ingaruka n'uko)
kirundi.e_g_my_child_uses_a_screen_reader_and_: urugero Umwana wanje akoresha umusomyi wa ecran kandi ntashobora kunyura mu mafishi yo kwiyandikisha...
kirundi.if_unresolved_file_with_the_doj_at_ada: Nimba bitakemutse, tanga ikirego kuri DOJ kuri ada.gov/file-a-complaint/
kirundi.no_audits_yet_run_your_first_audit_to_: Nta genzura riraboneka. Koresha igenzura ryawe rya mbere kugira ngo urabe ibisubizo hano.
